product_overview: CatatWang is a personal finance web app that lets users record transactions, view financial summaries, schedule WhatsApp reminders, and link a WhatsApp account to intake messages as transactions. It provides a protected dashboard, transaction management, and reminder configuration for regular notifications.
core_goals: Allow users to securely sign in and access their personal finance dashboard
Let users record, view, filter, update, and remove income and expense transactions
Provide a digestible dashboard with totals, charts, and recent transaction insights
Enable users to link their WhatsApp account to send/link transaction data and view session status
Let users schedule and persist reminder preferences (daily/weekly) for automated notifications

features.name: Authentication (Email/Password Sign‑in)
features.description: Allow existing users to sign in with email and password to access protected areas of the app.
user_flows: Navigate to /sign-in -> Fill in email and password -> Submit sign in form -> See dashboard
Navigate to /sign-in -> Fill in email and incorrect password -> Submit sign in form -> Remain on sign-in page and see credential error

features.name: Transaction Management
features.description: Create new income and expense transactions, browse and filter the transaction list, and update or delete transactions from the list.
user_flows: Navigate to /transactions -> Add transaction with amount, type, date, category, and note -> Submit new transaction -> See new transaction appear in the transactions list
Navigate to /transactions -> Apply filters by date range, type, or category -> See transactions list update to match filters
Navigate to /transactions -> Open a transaction from the list to view its details -> Update amount, category, or note -> Save changes -> See updated values reflected in the transactions list
Navigate to /transactions -> Open a transaction from the list to view its details -> Delete the transaction -> See the transaction removed from the list

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Show financial summary cards, cashflow charts, top categories, and recent transactions so users can quickly understand their finances.
user_flows: After sign in navigate to /dashboard -> View totals and charts for income, expense, and net cashflow -> Review recent transaction widgets
Create or update a transaction via the transactions page -> Navigate to /dashboard -> See totals and charts reflect the transaction changes

features.name: WhatsApp Linking and Webhook Intake
features.description: Generate a link code to connect a WhatsApp bot/session and view the WhatsApp session status so incoming messages can be processed as transactions.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings/whatsapp -> Request link code from settings -> See link code and expiry information displayed

Navigate to /settings/whatsapp -> Request link code from settings -> Send the provided link code to the WhatsApp bot from a WhatsApp client -> Check WA session status in settings and observe updated session state

features.name: Reminder Scheduling
features.description: Configure and persist reminder preferences (enable/disable, daily or weekly schedule, and reminder time) so the system can dispatch reminders on the chosen cadence.
user_flows: Navigate to /reminders -> Enable reminders -> Choose daily frequency and set a time on a 5-minute increment -> Save settings -> See confirmation and reload to verify settings persisted
Navigate to /reminders -> Enable reminders -> Attempt to set a time with a non-5-minute increment -> See validation error about allowed time increments -> Choose a valid time and save settings

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Register, verify email, sign in/out, and password reset flows
user_interactions: Register account and verify email code

features.name: Transaction Management
features.description: Create, list, filter, update, and delete user transactions
user_interactions: Add transaction with amount, type, date, category, note
Open detail page and update or delete transaction

features.name: Dashboard Analytics
features.description: Display summary cards, recent transactions, and category trends

features.name: WhatsApp Linking and Webhook Intake
features.description: Link WhatsApp account and process incoming WhatsApp messages into transactions
user_interactions: Request link code from settings page
Send link code to WhatsApp bot
Check WA session/QR status in settings

features.name: Reminder Scheduling
features.description: Save reminder preferences and trigger reminder dispatch through cron endpoint

known_limitations.issue: Reminder dispatch depends on external scheduler (GitHub Actions) and WAHA availability.
known_limitations.impact: If scheduler secret/runtime fails, reminders are not triggered automatically.

known_limitations.issue: OCR receipt input is currently not supported in WhatsApp webhook flow.
known_limitations.impact: Image messages receive fallback text instead of transaction extraction.
